message:
fix: prevent resolveCommandBeadsDir from falling back to CWD-based discovery (fix-merge PR #2775)

When --db points to a different project, resolveCommandBeadsDir() fell
back to FindBeadsDir() which walks from CWD and discovers the local
project .beads/ directory, ignoring the explicit --db flag.

Delegate to resolveBeadsDirForDBPath() (from GH#2627) which validates
candidates against dbPath before returning.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
